description: FitFusion primary test — size M model wearing XL Cropped Borg Aviator Jacket. Validates the LOOSE-fit code path of the size-aware system.

size_physics._note: garment chest (120cm) vs person bust (92cm) = +28cm = correct LOOSE fit for an oversized jacket

run_command: cd IDM-VTON && python run_tryon.py --product_id cropped-borg-aviator-jacket-black --brand_id snag_tights --s3_image_url file:///workspace/FitFusion/data/test_inputs/person_model_C_Pixie.jpg --bust 92 --waist 76 --hips 100 --height 167 --size XL --output /workspace/output_XL.png --steps 30 --seed 42

universal_standard_test._description: Alternative test using Universal Standard Geneva Classic Top — cleaner flat-lay product photography, better garment image quality for diffusion conditioning.
universal_standard_test._garment_image_note: Place a garment flat-lay image at data/test_inputs/garment_us_geneva_classic_top_M.jpg — download from https://www.universalstandard.com/products/geneva-classic-top, right-click the product photo, save as garment_us_geneva_classic_top_M.jpg

size_chart._note: Full size chart in data/measurements/garments.json → universal_standard.geneva_classic_top

universal_standard_test.run_command: cd IDM-VTON && python run_tryon.py --product_id geneva-classic-top --brand_id universal_standard --s3_image_url file:///workspace/FitFusion/data/test_inputs/person_model_C_Pixie.jpg --bust 92 --waist 76 --hips 100 --height 167 --size XL --output /workspace/output_us_XL.png --steps 30 --seed 42

additional_test_scenarios.description: Same model, L jacket — slightly loose
